tiers.name: Phase I: Diagnostic & Stabilization
features: Commercial EKG — full stage-by-stage audit
Clear positioning across profiles and owned properties
Gateway routing for low-friction buyer entry
Website structure built for buyer evaluation
First-layer visibility and follow-through improvements
Offline-to-online entry points (signatures, cards, lead magnets)
Messaging and proof cleanup across the journey

tiers.name: Phase II: Orchestration
features: Everything in Phase I
Managed Nervous System (MNS) installation
Information Fusion for automated signal capture
Website or microsite restructuring around the canonical journey
Nurture, review, and follow-up automation
Recurring operating reviews tied to buyer and customer signals
Stronger stage definitions and handoff improvements

tiers.name: Phase III: Transition
features: Everything in Phase II
Stronger governance and ownership rules
Tool rationalization and workflow simplification
Data model hardening and system documentation
Transition planning for deeper architecture work
The Alabrida Bridge — readiness for owned infrastructure
Full path to a Unified Commercial Engine
